notes: Section 93, , , which related to sale of machine tools to trade, technical, and public schools and universities, had been transferred to section 1180a of former Title 10, Army and Air Force, and was later repealed by act .act Nov. 19, 1919, ch. 11841 Stat. 360Oct. 31, 1951
